state_model.claim_boundary: This file preserves durable baselines, authority, capabilities, and promoted evidence. Live GitHub and Azure state must be queried at read time.

last_substantive_baseline.title: Fix collector demo API deployment name collision
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: PR #59 separates the parent and nested ARM deployment names after run 30044644501 accepted the isolated What-If but failed during deployment. It does not prove a fresh plan, successful deployment, zero post-failure mutation, or service verification.

latest_promoted_repository_event.title: Fix collector demo API deployment name collision
latest_promoted_repository_event.claim_boundary: The merge repairs repository implementation only. A fresh isolated What-If is required before any later deploy decision.

work_ownership_resolution.rule: Resolve default-branch head, open pull requests, branch ownership, and exact-head CI before every write. Pull-request descriptions carry transient branch scope; merged state files must not claim their own PR remains active.

repository_capabilities.claim_boundary: The active demo path is the collector-hosted API through an isolated Bicep root. Repository presence and CI prove implementation only; fresh Azure evidence is required for planning, deployment, and operation.

bounded_authority_grants.authorization_source: Explicit user instruction for the separately bounded read-only publication planner
bounded_authority_grants.claim_boundary: This grant applies only to the existing-collector report-publication planner. It does not authorize the collector demo API workflow, deployment, RBAC mutation, guest commands, cleanup, or any Azure mutation.

authority_defaults.rule: Authority is fail-closed unless a narrowly scoped current human instruction and workflow contract explicitly permit the operation.

legacy_demo_backend_api.claim_boundary: Run 30029515018 partially mutated Azure before Microsoft.Web quota failure. Backend VMs and two leftover resources were observed, but listener and application behavior remain unverified.

collector_hosted_demo_api.claim_boundary: Run 30044644501 accepted nine isolated creates and authorized a deploy, but the deployment command failed on a parent/nested ARM deployment-name collision and produced no deployment result JSON. PR #59 repaired the name collision. Post-failure Azure target-resource state and service behavior remain unproven; a fresh isolated What-If is required.

quota_and_locks.freshness_boundary: Time-bounded pre-deployment evidence from run 30044644501; post-failure target-resource state and later quota remain unproven.

deployment_state.claim_boundary: Backend VM existence is not listener health. Readiness is not an accepted isolated What-If. An accepted What-If is not deployment. Deployment is not service validation.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This is the newest promoted authenticated Azure run. PR #59 changes the deployment name afterward, so the exact plan must be refreshed before a retry. The failed command does not prove zero partial mutation.

collector_replacement.freshness_boundary: Historical control-plane evidence; guest health, recovery point, pricing, quota, and execution readiness require refresh.

report_publication.freshness_boundary: Separate publication workstream evidence. It does not establish current collector API or deployment state.

collector_demo_api.freshness_boundary: This is the newest promoted authenticated Azure run. PR #59 changes the deployment name afterward, so the exact plan must be refreshed before a retry. The failed command does not prove zero partial mutation.

configuration_state.claim_boundary: Live frontend endpoints remain blank because deployment and service verification are not established. Query-string overrides remain the bounded pre-promotion test path.

live_state_resolution.repository: Query live GitHub default branch and exact head.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query open pull requests, write ownership, review state, and mergeability.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh scoped inventory, quota, policy, RBAC, ARM validation, What-If, deployment, guest, service, cost, and cleanup evidence.
live_state_resolution.local_working_tree: Not observable through the GitHub connector; inspect separately before local writes or merges.
